_comment: Normalized Azure network state (the shape the Azure connector's fixtures transport consumes: `az network nsg list` / `az vm list -o json` with the VM->NIC->NSG and ASG associations resolved). A web VM sits behind an NSG that admits the Internet service tag (mapped to 0.0.0.0/0 -> internet-exposed) and belongs to the web-asg. The db NSG admits that ASG on 5432 (east-west micro-segmentation), so the discovered lateral edge is internet -> web-vm -> payments-db-vm, a PII database VM tagged as a crown jewel.
